caption: A person's hand interacts with a black trading card box labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "Topps" atop a black mat featuring the logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" in orange and white text. The scene is set in a room with a plain white wall and several other card boxes in the background. A small red and white object sits to the left. In the upper right of the video, a small picture-in-picture window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap, with the logo "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.com" visible. Across the frames, the hand reaches for and adjusts the box, sliding it across the mat. The box displays the year "2020" in red text and the phrase "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" repeatedly. The video concludes with the hand pressing down on the top of the box as it rests on the "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" branding.
